name: Basic Sourdough Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter over moderate heat and add the milk, stirring until warm.
2. Add the salt, sugar, and stir until dissolved.
3. Combine this mixture with the starter and mix well.
4. Gradually add 1 cup of flour at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Pour the batter into a 4 1/2 x 8 1/2 inch loaf pan.
6. Allow it to rise for 1 to 2 hours, or until it has risen about 1/2 inch above the pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
